description: Customer requested a quote 7 days ago and never replied

messages.content: Hi, I'm interested in your inventory management software. We have about 40 staff and three warehouses. Can you send me a quote?
Hi Sarah! Great to hear from you. I've put together a tailored quote for a 40-user licence across three sites — I'll email it over to you now. Let me know if you have any questions.
Just sent the quote to the email on file. It covers the Professional tier with multi-site support. Keen to walk you through it on a call if that helps.
